description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Pull Request Checks that runs on every pull request to the master branch. Use a single ubuntu-latest job that checks out the repository, sets up .NET Core 3.1 and .NET 5, and Node.js 10.x. Then, verify building by installing npm dependencies, copying files, building with dotnet, and publishing to cargo. Finally, run tests with coverage reporting using dotnet test and upload results to Codecov with CODECOV_TOKEN from secrets.
